title: Top N records by column
description: Retrieve the highest N records ranked by a numeric column
prompt: Show the top 10 {table} records ordered by {column} descending

title: Count records by group
description: Count how many records exist per category or group
prompt: Count the number of {table} records grouped by {column}

title: Sum values by group
description: Sum a numeric column grouped by a category
prompt: Show the total {numeric_column} for each {group_column} in {table}

title: Records within date range
prompt: Show all {table} records where {date_column} is between {start_date} and {end_date}

title: Records from last N days
description: Retrieve recent records from the past N days
prompt: Show all {table} records from the last 30 days based on {date_column}

title: Monthly summary
description: Summarise data by month and year
prompt: Show monthly totals of {column} from {table} for the current year grouped by month

title: Find records with missing values
description: Find records where a column is NULL or empty
prompt: Show all {table} records where {column} is null or empty

title: Find duplicate records
description: Detect duplicate values in a column
prompt: Find duplicate {column} values in {table} and show how many times each appears

title: Join two tables
description: Combine records from two related tables
prompt: Show all {table1} records with their related {table2} information joined on the common key

title: Records without related data
description: Find records that have no matching entry in a related table
prompt: Show all {table1} records that have no matching records in {table2}

title: Average, min and max
description: Calculate statistical summary for a numeric column
prompt: Show the average, minimum and maximum {column} from {table}

title: Search records by keyword
description: Find records where a text column contains a keyword
prompt: Find all {table} records where {column} contains the word {keyword}
